description:
Join us on our 10 day adventure through the beautiful Scandic country of Norway. This incredible country is home to breathtaking wildlife, stunning and powerful natural landscapes, and some of the happiest people on earth. With fisherman huts, whirlpools, Fjords, waterfalls, amazing cities, one of the most scenic railways in Europe, and some of the worlds best hiking it is easy to see why Norway is such a nature-lovers paradise. We absolutely loved Norway and hope that through our adventure you can see why. 

0:00 Intro to Norway
1:04 Bødo - World's Largest Whirlpool (Saltstraumen)
2:48 Exploring the city of Å, Lofoten
3:14 Reine and Hiking Reinebringen
3:58 Skagsanden Beach
4:19 Nusfjord
4:53 Fløya Hike in Svolvær
5:56 Henningsvær
6:12 Oslo and the Norwegian Sauna
8:29 Night train to Stavanger
9:22 Stavanger & Hiking Pulpit Rock
10:53 Drive to Odda
12:02 Hiking Trolltunga
13:27 Voss
13:54 Flåm and Flåm Railway (Flåmsbana)
15:30 Bergen
17:27 Recap
